title: Zebronics South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Zebronics South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Zebronics South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zebronics South Asia Partners:
Zebronics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics South Asia Partners!
